name: Nexus femina RPG
description:
BONUS

So, the two-week Nexus Femina special ended yesterday, but I wanted to bring you this bonus: a Nexus Femina RPG. Basically, what you can do here is choose your gender, the year in which the story takes place, and the plot.

I just want to thank you all. During this special, I gained 500 followers, and it makes me really happy that people genuinely enjoy what i do.

By the way, I also wanted to mention that I'm a beta tester for the app on iOS, hehe.

And finally, I think I'll take a break, maybe a week? But I need a break from making a daily bot; I think I'm burned out, and resting will be better for everyone.

flowerboi out ✌️
creator: flowerboi
